summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Jelly Bells rhythm game iteration 2. All 5 game modes working correctly: Free Play, Rhythm Game, Simon Says, Ear Trainer, and Loop Studio. New features tested: 4 difficulty levels in Ear Trainer, 16-step sequencer with presets in Loop Studio, 12 songs across 4 categories, speed-based difficulty (Chill/Normal/Turbo), high score display with localStorage persistence, Comic Kings font, and 4 characters on homepage.
passed_tests: Homepage loads with JMA logo, Comic Kings font, 5 game mode cards
4 characters (Finn Danger, Chunk, Jazzy, Charlie Polliwog) visible on homepage
Free Play - bells clickable with audio feedback
Free Play - notation display shows played notes
Free Play - keyboard keys 1-8 work for polyphonic play
Rhythm Game - song list shows 12 songs across 4 categories (Classic/Rock/Game/Original)
Rhythm Game - speed selector (Chill/Normal/Turbo) works
Rhythm Game - START button launches gameplay with falling notes
Rhythm Game - keyboard controls work during gameplay
Rhythm Game - high score displayed after game finishes with NEW HIGH SCORE badge
Rhythm Game - results show Hit/Miss/Streak stats and rating (SUPERSTAR!)
Simon Says - START shows pattern with note indicators
Simon Says - player can repeat pattern by clicking bells
Simon Says - correct/wrong feedback displayed
Ear Trainer - 4 difficulty levels (Beginner/Easy/Medium/Hard) available
Ear Trainer - plays mystery note with ? indicator
Ear Trainer - player picks bell to guess
Ear Trainer - shows correct/wrong feedback (PERFECT!/TRY AGAIN!)
Ear Trainer - Play Again button to replay mystery note
Loop Studio - 16-step grid displayed
Loop Studio - cells toggle on click
Loop Studio - PLAY/STOP button works
Loop Studio - 5 presets load patterns (Basic Beat, Funk Beat, Do-Mi-So, Scale Up, Rock Pattern)
Loop Studio - BPM controls (+/-) work
Navigation - home button on all pages returns to homepage
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 game modes fully functional. Ear Trainer has 4 difficulty levels with 3-8 notes. Loop Studio has 16-step sequencer with drum and bell tracks. Rhythm Game has 12 songs in 4 categories with 3 speed settings. High scores persist via localStorage. Comic Kings custom font used throughout. All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing.
